source_rationale: PRG4 (lubricin/proteoglycan 4) is a marker of synovial fibroblasts and mesenchymal stromal cells in joint tissues
FBN1 (fibrillin-1) is an extracellular matrix gene highly expressed by fibroblasts
PI16 is a well-established marker of universal/adventitial fibroblasts
MFAP5 encodes microfibril-associated glycoprotein characteristic of fibroblast ECM production
COL1A1 is a canonical collagen gene marking matrix-producing fibroblasts
CD248 (endosialin) is a marker of perivascular/stromal fibroblasts
SFRP4 is a Wnt pathway modulator enriched in synovial lining fibroblasts
CLEC3B (tetranectin) is expressed by mesenchymal/fibroblast populations
IL1RL1 (ST2) is a key marker of Th2 and regulatory T cells responsive to IL-33
GATA3 is the master transcription factor for Th2 CD4+ T cell differentiation
KLRB1 (CD161) marks Th17/tissue-resident T cells and innate-like lymphocytes
IL7R (CD127) is expressed on naive and memory T cells, supporting T cell identity
CCR4 is a chemokine receptor characteristic of Th2 and regulatory T cells
IL2RA (CD25) marks activated and regulatory T cells
HPGD is enriched in tissue-resident Tregs and Th2 cells
RORA is a transcription factor involved in Th17/ILC2 differentiation
KIT (CD117) marks immature thymocytes and innate lymphoid cell progenitors
CCR6 is a chemokine receptor marking Th17 and mucosal-homing T cells
IL7R supports T cell identity, particularly naive/memory subsets
DLL1 is a Notch ligand associated with early T cell development
TNFRSF4 (OX40) is a costimulatory receptor on activated T cells
TNFRSF18 (GITR) marks activated and regulatory T cells
IL1R1 expression on T cells is associated with Th17 and tissue-resident memory phenotypes
XCL1 (lymphotactin) is a chemokine produced by activated T cells and NK cells

TNFRSF4 (OX40) marks activated CD4+ T cells
SELL (CD62L) is a lymph node homing receptor on naive/central memory T cells
SPINK2 is associated with early thymic progenitors and immature T cells
GATA3 is the master Th2 transcription factor, supporting CD4+ T cell identity
CD7 is a pan-T/NK cell marker expressed on immature and mature lymphocytes

CD8A expression in combination with gamma-delta TCR genes suggests CD8+ gamma-delta T cells
LYZ (lysozyme) is a canonical myeloid/monocyte marker

S100A8 forms a heterodimer with S100A9, marking inflammatory myeloid cells

FCN1 is a classical monocyte marker
